capabilities: Combine priority scheduling with AI-prompting derived knowledge to optimize task execution by merging workflows and ensuring output validity.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from priority scheduling and AI-prompting by applying domain-specific tooling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assert merged output using domain-specific tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Filter candidate tasks for scheduling using domain-specific tooling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assign results from the merged knowledge base using domain-specific tooling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Integrate priority scheduling with AI-prompting derived knowledge by merging workflows and validating outputs to ensure efficient task execution.
title: Priority Scheduling

failureConditions: Inconsistent task execution when merge omits NULL handling, causing tasks with NULL priority fields to be dropped.
Increased error rates when validation steps are skipped, leading to invalid task scheduling and execution.
Audit trail gaps when logging is incomplete, causing difficulty in tracing task execution issues.
